selectedWorkOrder.title: Public no-hidden-core-content route map
selectedWorkOrder.reason: The previous handoff named public no-hidden-core-content coverage, and current source lacked a visible route map that connected required student/teacher content to existing public pages.

candidateSummary.decision: rejected: broader than one safe slice

changes: Added noHiddenCoreContentRoutes to app.js with visible public page groupings for planning, evidence/build work, presentation preparation, and finish/archive work.
Rendered a Core guide coverage section on the public home page with data-no-hidden-core-content=true.
Added source test coverage for the marker, required content clusters, and existing public route links.
Updated MVP catalog, functionality audit, growth ledger/state, run log, and this manifest.

validation.notes: git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

nextRecommendedWorkOrder: Inspect page-level Student/Teacher emphasis across the public route set, or run hosted section-level permission proof when credentialed runtime is available.
doNotRepeat: Do not re-add the public no-hidden-core-content route map unless regression removes data-no-hidden-core-content or Required Content Has A Visible Path from source/generated output.
